description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a green exterior and a metallic pull tab on top. The can features a prominent circular logo with a hand and the word 'Soda' in a stylized font, as well as bold white text referencing 'Call of Duty Black Ops Zombies.' Nutritional information and additional text are printed on the side in white, with a blocky, modern typeface. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and the top is slightly recessed with a standard pull tab opening. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on gaming-themed graphics and a zombie motif. The can appears unopened and is likely filled with a carbonated beverage.
description: A tall, green aluminum can with gaming-themed graphics, a pull tab top, and bold white text. The design is modern, glossy, and features a zombie motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular logo with a hand and the word 'Soda' on a green background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information and white text in a blocky font.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the 'Call of Duty Black Ops Zombies' text and a zombie graphic.
description_view_3: Angled view showing part of the logo and the start of the large white text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold green background with white and yellow text, a circular logo with a hand, and a stylized zombie graphic. The typography is modern and blocky, with gaming-themed elements and a clean, glossy finish.
